passives.name: Hackshorn
passives.effects: Dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemy champions inflicts them with {{tip|Grievous Wounds}} for 3 seconds.

effects_structured.raw: Dealing physical damage to enemy champions inflicts 40% Grievous Wounds for 3 seconds.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Hackshorn applies Grievous Wounds to enemy champions on any qualifying physical-damage event and refreshes the 3-second anti-heal window on repeated hits.
Player-visible behavior: anti-heal application is tied to champion damage and remains applied even when the triggering physical-damage instance is absorbed by a shield.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.name: CommunityDragon items dataset
sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror

sources.name: League Wiki (Chempunk Chainsword)
sources.used_for: page-level verification of Hackshorn trigger scope, Grievous Wounds duration, and shield-mitigated-hit application behavior
local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring
